hooks.command: agent_type=$(jq -r '.tool_input.subagent_type // "general-purpose"' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$agent_type" | grep -qE '^meesell-|^nexus:|^claude-code-guide$|^statusline-setup$'; then echo '{"decision": "allow"}'; else printf '{"decision": "block", "reason": "In MeeSell context, use meesell-* agents or nexus:level-* fallback. %s is not allowed."}' "$agent_type"; fi
